languages.text: "Каждый цикл мы посвящали себя служению Огненной Посланнице, моля провести души родных через тьму к Золотому Трону. Оттого нам, Детям Искупления, безмерно горько доживать свои последние обороты. Ибо обречены мы вечно бродить в пустоте, не в силах отбыть к Бессмертному без проводницы усопших. И хоть мы и предаем тела почивших огню... Жар пламени не сравнится с поцелуем Ноллы".

И хоть мы и предаем тела почивших огню... Жар пламени не сравнится с поцелуем Ноллы".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Each cycle we devoted ourselves to Fiery Messenger, begging her to guide the souls of the departed through void to the Golden Throne. Which is why we, Children of Redemption, mourn our final turns on this dying world. We are doomed to wander the void for eternity, unable to reach the Immortal without His guide. And though we commit the bodies of our dead to flame... The fire's heat cannot compare to Nolla's kisses."
languages.original_text: "Каждый цикл мы посвящали себя служению Огненной Посланнице, моля провести души родных через тьму к Золотому Трону. Оттого нам, Детям Искупления, безмерно горько доживать свои последние обороты. Ибо обречены мы вечно бродить в пустоте, не в силах отбыть к Бессмертному без проводницы усопших. И хоть мы и предаем тела почивших огню... Жар пламени не сравнится с поцелуем Ноллы".

languages.text: "In jedem Zyklus widmeten wir uns der Feurigen Botin und baten sie, die Seelen der Verstorbenen durch die Leere zum Goldenen Thron zu führen. Deshalb trauern wir, Kinder der Erlösung, um unsere letzten Schritte auf dieser sterbenden Welt. Wir sind dazu verdammt, bis in alle Ewigkeit durch die Leere zu wandern, unfähig, den Unsterblichen ohne seine Führung zu erreichen. Und obwohl wir die Körper unserer Toten den Flammen übergeben... kann die Hitze des Feuers nicht mit Nollas Küssen verglichen werden."
languages.original_text: "Each cycle we devoted ourselves to Fiery Messenger, begging her to guide the souls of the departed through void to the Golden Throne. Which is why we, Children of Redemption, mourn our final turns on this dying world. We are doomed to wander the void for eternity, unable to reach the Immortal without His guide. And though we commit the bodies of our dead to flame... The fire's heat cannot compare to Nolla's kisses."

languages.text: "Chaque cycle, nous nous consacrions à la Messagère ardente, la suppliant de guider les âmes des défunts à travers le vide jusqu'au Trône d'or. C'est pourquoi nous, enfants de la Rédemption, pleurons nos derniers tours sur ce monde mourant. Nous sommes condamnés à errer dans le vide pour l'éternité, incapables d'atteindre l'Immortel sans son guide. Et même si nous livrons les corps de nos morts à la flamme... La chaleur du feu n'est pas comparable aux baisers de Nolla."
languages.original_text: "Each cycle we devoted ourselves to Fiery Messenger, begging her to guide the souls of the departed through void to the Golden Throne. Which is why we, Children of Redemption, mourn our final turns on this dying world. We are doomed to wander the void for eternity, unable to reach the Immortal without His guide. And though we commit the bodies of our dead to flame... The fire's heat cannot compare to Nolla's kisses."

languages.text: "每个轮回，我们都献身于烈火使者，恳求她引导逝者的灵魂穿越虚空，抵达黄金王座。这就是为什么我们，救赎之子，哀悼我们在这个垂死世界的最后轮回。我们注定要在虚空中永远徘徊，没有祂的指引，我们无法到达不朽之境。尽管我们将亡者的尸体付之一炬......"火的热度也比不上诺拉的吻"
languages.original_text: "Each cycle we devoted ourselves to Fiery Messenger, begging her to guide the souls of the departed through void to the Golden Throne. Which is why we, Children of Redemption, mourn our final turns on this dying world. We are doomed to wander the void for eternity, unable to reach the Immortal without His guide. And though we commit the bodies of our dead to flame... The fire's heat cannot compare to Nolla's kisses."

languages.text: "Cada ciclo nos consagrábamos a Mensajera Ardiente, rogándole que guiara las almas de los difuntos a través del vacío hasta el Trono Dorado. Por eso nosotros, Hijos de la Redención, lloramos nuestras últimas vueltas en este mundo moribundo. Estamos condenados a vagar por el vacío durante toda la eternidad, incapaces de alcanzar al Inmortal sin Su guía. Y aunque entregamos los cuerpos de nuestros muertos a las llamas... El calor del fuego no puede compararse con los besos de Nolla".
languages.original_text: "Each cycle we devoted ourselves to Fiery Messenger, begging her to guide the souls of the departed through void to the Golden Throne. Which is why we, Children of Redemption, mourn our final turns on this dying world. We are doomed to wander the void for eternity, unable to reach the Immortal without His guide. And though we commit the bodies of our dead to flame... The fire's heat cannot compare to Nolla's kisses."

languages.text: "毎サイクル、我々はFiery Messengerに身を捧げ、亡者の魂を虚空を黄金の玉座へと導いてくれるよう懇願した。だからこそ、われわれ贖罪の子らは、この滅びゆく世界での最後の出番を嘆くのだ。私たちは永遠に虚空をさまよい、不滅の神の導きなしに到達することはできない運命にある。死者の遺体を炎に捧げても...炎の熱はノーラのキスに及ばない"
languages.original_text: "Each cycle we devoted ourselves to Fiery Messenger, begging her to guide the souls of the departed through void to the Golden Throne. Which is why we, Children of Redemption, mourn our final turns on this dying world. We are doomed to wander the void for eternity, unable to reach the Immortal without His guide. And though we commit the bodies of our dead to flame... The fire's heat cannot compare to Nolla's kisses."

languages.text: "Her döngüde kendimizi Ateşli Haberci'ye adadık, ölenlerin ruhlarını boşluktan geçirerek Altın Taht'a götürmesi için ona yalvardık. İşte bu yüzden biz, Kefaretin Çocukları, bu ölmekte olan dünyadaki son dönüşlerimizin yasını tutuyoruz. Sonsuza dek boşlukta dolaşmaya mahkûm edildik, O'nun rehberi olmadan Ölümsüz'e ulaşamıyoruz. Ve her ne kadar ölülerimizin bedenlerini ateşe versek de. Ateşin sıcaklığı Nolla'nın öpücükleriyle kıyaslanamaz."
languages.original_text: "Each cycle we devoted ourselves to Fiery Messenger, begging her to guide the souls of the departed through void to the Golden Throne. Which is why we, Children of Redemption, mourn our final turns on this dying world. We are doomed to wander the void for eternity, unable to reach the Immortal without His guide. And though we commit the bodies of our dead to flame... The fire's heat cannot compare to Nolla's kisses."
